headline: 暑期档预热：新片潮来袭
headlineEn: Summer Movie Season Heats Up with New Releases
summary: 今日娱乐新闻：暑期档预热，多部新片蓄势待发。《痴迷》持续霸榜，《福尔摩斯小姐3》与《玩具总动员5》备受期待。
summaryEn: Today's entertainment news: Summer movie season heats up with several new films on the horizon. 'Obsession' continues to dominate, while 'Enola Holmes 3' and 'Toy Story 5' are highly anticipated.

industryHighlights.text: 《痴迷》连续一周霸榜，热度不减
industryHighlights.en: 'Obsession' tops the trending chart for a week straight

industryHighlights.text: 《福尔摩斯小姐3》定档引发粉丝狂欢
industryHighlights.en: 'Enola Holmes 3' release date sparks fan frenzy

industryHighlights.text: 《穿普拉达的女王2》筹备中，原班人马有望回归
industryHighlights.en: 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' in development, original cast may return
